name: gameobject-component-list-all
title: GameObject / Component / List All
description: When gameObjectRef is provided: list all components attached to that GameObject (type name + instanceID). When gameObjectRef is omitted: list all available C# component type names in the project (for 'gameobject-component-add' tool). Results are paginated.

parameters.name: gameObjectRef
parameters.description: Target GameObject. When provided, lists components ON this object. When omitted, lists all available component types. SCHEMA: {"name":"ObjectName"} or {"instanceID":12345}

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Substring for searching/filtering component names. Could be empty.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Default is 20. Max is 500.

notes: Pass gameObjectRef to list components on an object; omit to list all available component types in the project
Format when listing object components: 'TypeName (instanceID: 123, index: 0)'
Prefer using instanceID (more reliable); name resolution may fail on newly created objects or during scene loading
